hashing.text: Aurora partitions the key space using consistent hashing across nodes.

failover.text: When a node fails, GossipBus detects the failure and ShardRing rebalances partitions.

items.text: Document describes quorum acknowledgements on writes.

consistency.text: Writes are quorum-acknowledged across N replicas (default N=3).
Cross-partition writes are not atomic; users requiring multi-key atomicity should compose at the application layer.
